name: @openvole/paw-computer
description: Desktop automation — control mouse, keyboard, and screen capture

tools.name: computer_screenshot
tools.description: Capture the screen and return as base64 PNG with active window info

tools.name: computer_type
tools.description: Type text at the current cursor position

tools.name: computer_key
tools.description: Press a key combination (e.g. ctrl+c, cmd+tab, enter)

tools.name: computer_mouse_move
tools.description: Move the mouse cursor to coordinates without clicking

tools.name: computer_scroll
tools.description: Scroll up or down at a screen position

tools.name: computer_drag
tools.description: Drag from one screen position to another

tools.name: computer_active_window
tools.description: Get the title and bounds of the currently active window

tools.name: computer_ui_tree
tools.description: Read the accessibility UI tree — all buttons, fields, menus with positions. Cheaper than screenshots.

tools.name: computer_clipboard_read
tools.description: Read the current clipboard content as text
